title.zh: 子午流注养生法：十二时辰养生全攻略

description.zh: 深入解读中医子午流注理论，掌握十二时辰养生方法，让身体与自然节律同步
description.en: Deep dive into TCM's Midnight-Noon Flow theory, master the 12-meridian daily wellness method

zh.text: 子午流注是中医的重要时间医学理论，认为人体气血在一天24小时内按照固定节律流经十二经脉。每个时辰都有对应的脏腑当令，顺应这个节律进行养生，可以达到事半功倍的效果。
子午流注是中医针灸学中的一种时间治疗方法，将一天24小时分为十二个时辰，每个时辰对应一条经络。当某条经脉在对应时辰气血最旺时进行调理，效果最佳。这体现了中医"天人合一"的核心思想。

items: 养生要诀：23点前入睡，养初生阳气
此时熬夜耗损肝胆之气
推荐：安静入睡，避免剧烈活动
养生要诀：深度睡眠，养肝藏血
推荐：保证充足睡眠，侧卧为佳
肺经旺，气血由肺输布全身
此时醒来难以入睡是肺气不足
推荐：继续睡眠，不宜早起
此时应喝温水，促进肠道蠕动
推荐：晨起排便，早餐不宜过饱
胃经旺，消化吸收能力最强
养生要诀：工作学习黄金时间
推荐：适当活动，避免久坐
推荐：静心养神，避免剧烈运动
此时记忆力好，适合学习
推荐：适当饮水，及时排尿
推荐：傍晚锻炼，晚餐宜清淡
推荐：保持心情舒畅，避免争吵
顺应天时：按照时辰养生，事半功倍
起居有常：规律作息，顺应自然节律
饮食有节：按时进食，七分饱为宜
动静结合：根据时辰调整活动强度
情志调摄：不同时辰保持相应心态

zh.text: 根据不同时辰，可以按摩对应经络的重要穴位：
温馨提示：子午流注养生需要长期坚持才能见效。每个人的体质不同，应根据自身情况调整养生方案。如有健康问题，请咨询专业中医师。

en.text: Midnight-Noon Flow (Zi Wu Liu Zhu) is an important time-medicine theory in TCM. It believes that Qi and Blood flow through the twelve meridians in a fixed rhythm within 24 hours. Each two-hour period corresponds to an organ system. Following this rhythm for wellness achieves optimal results.

Midnight-Noon Flow is a time-based therapy method in TCM acupuncture. It divides 24 hours into twelve two-hour periods, each corresponding to a meridian. When a meridian is at its peak during its corresponding time, treatment is most effective. This embodies the core TCM concept of "Unity of Man and Nature."

items: Wellness tip: Sleep before 11 PM, nourish newborn Yang
Staying up late damages Liver-Gallbladder Qi
Recommendation: Quiet sleep, avoid strenuous activity
Wellness tip: Deep sleep, nourish Liver and store Blood
Insomnia at this time harms Liver
Recommendation: Ensure adequate sleep, sleep on side
Waking early indicates Lung Qi deficiency
Recommendation: Continue sleeping, avoid early rising
Drink warm water to stimulate peristalsis
Recommendation: Morning bowel movement, light breakfast
Wellness tip: Eat a good breakfast
Wellness tip: Golden time for work/study
Spleen meridian active, transforms food essence
Recommendation: Move regularly, avoid prolonged sitting
Recommendation: Quiet rest, avoid strenuous exercise
Small intestine active, separates pure from impure
Pericardium meridian active, clear heart fire
Good time for walking and chatting
San Jiao meridian active, regulate water passages
Recommendation: Foot bath, listen to calming music
Follow natural timing: Wellness by hour, double the effect
Moderate eating: Eat on time, 70% full
Balance activity: Adjust intensity by hour
Emotional balance: Appropriate mindset for each time

Note: Midnight-Noon Flow wellness requires long-term practice to see results. Everyone's constitution is different, adjust accordingly. Consult a qualified TCM practitioner for health concerns.
